script_text: Which is the uppercase, or capital, version of the letter A? Look at the choices and pick the right one.
voice_direction: Clear kindergarten teacher. Say the letter name 'AY' clearly. Do NOT read the individual letter choices.

script_text: Match each uppercase letter to its lowercase! Tap to connect each big letter to its matching small letter.
voice_direction: Clear kindergarten teacher. Do NOT spell out individual letter names. Just read the instruction.
